automations.title: Automations

automations.customSubtitle: Pick a trigger, add your conditions, and choose what happens.
automations.whenHint: Choose the event that starts this automation
automations.ifHint: Optional conditions — leave empty to always run
automations.doHint: Add one or more actions to run in order

actionHint.notify: You get an in-app notification + push automatically.
actionHint.whatsapp: You get a ready message to send the customer in one tap.
actionHint.loyalty: Loyalty points are added to the customer's balance.
actionHint.coupon: A discount coupon is sent to the customer.

conditions.minTotalHint: Only when the order total is greater than or equal to this
conditions.maxRatingHint: Only when the rating is less than or equal to this (low ratings)
conditions.hoursBeforeHint: How long before the appointment the reminder is sent — in hours (default 1).
conditions.inactiveDaysHint: How many days without an order before a customer counts as inactive (default 30).
conditions.none: No conditions for this trigger — it will always run.

automations.noActions: Add at least one action to save the automation.
automations.listEmpty: No automations yet — enable a recipe or build a custom one.

items.a: Yes — browsing and buying are completely free. Opening a basic store is also free, with no commission on your sales.
Most stores accept cash on delivery — you pay when your order arrives — and some offer additional options.
Every store is manually reviewed before it goes live, and there are real ratings and reviews from customers.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade to Pro as your store grows.
pricing.contactNote: Payment is manual for now — contact us to activate Pro after payment.
pricing.trialBanner: Try all Pro features free for 14 days — no card, no commitment.

faq.q: How do I pay for Pro?
faq.a: Payment is manual for now — you request the upgrade from your store dashboard, and we contact you to complete payment and activate Pro. Online payment is coming soon.
Yes — every new store gets a full 14-day Pro trial for free, no card required.

faq.q: Can I go back to the free plan?
faq.a: Absolutely. You can stay on Free or return to it anytime — your store and products remain.

faq.q: What happens after the trial ends?
faq.a: Your store keeps working on the Free plan, and Pro features lock until you subscribe.

faq.q: Is there a commission on sales?
faq.a: No — Matjar takes no commission on your orders. Only the monthly Pro subscription if you want the extra features.

aboutPage.body: Matjar is Lebanon's local commerce platform — one place that brings together stores, products, and services, helping business owners reach their customers with ease. Our goal is to make local shopping and booking faster and simpler, and to give every merchant their own online store in minutes.
aboutPage.title: An operating system for your business, and your store on Lebanon's map
aboutPage.storyBody: Most merchants in Lebanon sell on WhatsApp and Instagram — with no tools, no organization, and orders lost in chats. We built Matjar to give every Lebanese merchant a simple operating system and a professional digital presence, and to help customers find the nearest store and service in seconds.
aboutPage.missionBody: Give every local business in Lebanon the tools to run and grow — in the simplest way, at the lowest cost.
aboutPage.visionBody: To become the leading operating system for every merchant and business owner in Lebanon and the Arab world.

offer.d: Orders, bookings, customers, and reports in one place.
Your store ready in minutes, no technical skills needed.
Restaurants, clinics, shops, services, and more.
Stores and services in every region.
More trust for customer and merchant.

values.d: Made for Lebanon and its reality.

trustPage.metaDesc: How Matjar protects merchants and customers: cash on delivery, verified stores, a returns policy, and direct support.
trustPage.title: Trust & Safety on Matjar
trustPage.intro: We work to make every order and every interaction on Matjar safe and clear — for both merchant and customer.

customer.d: You pay when you receive your order — no risk.
We're building a store-verification system so you know who you're dealing with.
Call or message the store on WhatsApp before you order.
If something goes wrong, contact us and we'll help.

merchant.d: Your and your customers' information is protected and never shared.
We take no cut of your sales.
Our team is with you on WhatsApp anytime.
Your store, products, and data are yours — export or delete anytime.

trustPage.returnsBody: Since orders happen directly between you and the store (cash on delivery), returns and exchanges are arranged directly with the store. If you face an issue that isn't resolved, contact us and we'll step in to help both sides reach a fair solution.
trustPage.supportBody: Have a question or a problem? Reach out and we'll reply as soon as possible.

contactPage.intro: For inquiries or support, reach out — we reply as soon as possible.

faq.title: Help & FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Matjar.

items.q: How do I order a product?
items.a: Open a store or product, add it to the cart, tap "Order", fill in your address and phone, and confirm. The order reaches the merchant instantly and you can track it under "My orders". Payment is cash on delivery.

items.q: How do I open my store?
items.a: Tap "Open your store", pick your business type, fill in your store name and details, and add products. Your store is ready in minutes with a short link and QR code to share.
Zero commission on sales — the customer, their number, and the profit are all yours. There's an optional Pro plan ($12/mo) for higher visibility, analytics, and a verified badge.
A classifieds section where any user can post listings — buy and sell easily. You can save a search and get notified the moment a matching listing appears.
From your account page tap "Enable notifications" and allow your browser. You'll get order updates, the daily deal, and saved-search matches — even when the site is closed.
Currently cash on delivery, with the option to contact and order directly via WhatsApp with the merchant.
